# Tiny Tummies - AI-Ready Website Documentation

## Overview
Tiny Tummies provides fresh, hygienic, and kid-loved meal boxes for children (2-6 years), delivered to schools and homes across Bengaluru, India.

## Business
- **Service**: Children's meal delivery (subscription-based)
- **Location**: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- **Target Audience**: Parents of children aged 2-6 years
- **Key Value Props**: Freshly prepared daily, nutritionist-planned, hygienic stainless steel boxes, school-friendly delivery

## Pages
- `/` - Homepage with hero, how it works, pricing, and about sections
- `/terms` - Terms and Conditions
- `/get-started` - Signup page

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 16 with App Router
- React 19
- TypeScript (strict mode)
- Tailwind CSS 4
- Framer Motion for animations
- Lucide React for icons

## Data Structure
- `data/site.ts` - Contact info, nav links, site constants
- `data/hero.ts` - Hero section content
- `data/how-it-works.ts` - Problem/solution content
- `data/pricing.ts` - Plans and features
- `data/about.ts` - Company story and values
- `data/terms.ts` - Terms and FAQs

## Architecture Pattern
- **View**: Components in `components/sections/` and `components/ui/` - pure UI, no business logic
- **Data**: All static content in `data/` - typed interfaces, no duplication
- **Hooks**: Custom hooks in `lib/hooks/` for client-side logic (scroll animations)
- **Utils**: Shared utilities in `lib/utils/` for class merging and styling

## Key Files
- `app/page.tsx` - Homepage (thin route, composes sections)
- `app/layout.tsx` - Root layout with metadata
- `components/claymorph/` - Design system components
- `components/ui/FeatureBar.tsx` - Reusable feature display
- `lib/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts` - Scroll-triggered animations

## Content Topics
- Children's nutrition and healthy eating
- School lunch solutions for busy parents
- Meal subscription services in India
